_comment: Spectri Commands Manifest - Source of truth for command composition

_schema_docs._note: This schema documents all fields. Run 'jq ._schema_docs' to view without data.
_schema_docs.schema_version: Manifest schema version for compatibility checking (semver format)
_schema_docs.injections: Array of reusable injection component definitions
_schema_docs.injections[].id: Unique identifier (kebab-case) used in command.injections[].injection_id references
_schema_docs.injections[].name: Human-readable display name for documentation
_schema_docs.injections[].description: Brief description of what this injection provides
_schema_docs.injections[].insertion_point: Marker name to match: post-frontmatter | post-header | post-execution
_schema_docs.injections[].content_file: Path to content.md relative to src/injections/
_schema_docs.injections[].supports_params: Boolean (default false) - if true, content.md may use {{PARAM}} placeholders
_schema_docs.commands[].id: Command identifier matching output filename (e.g., 'spec.specify' → spec.specify.md)
_schema_docs.commands[].name: Human-readable command name for documentation
_schema_docs.commands[].family: Source folder: workflow-commands | spec-modification | quality-assurance | system-utilities | documentation
_schema_docs.commands[].category: Output subfolder for sync: spectri-core | spectri-modify | spectri-quality | spectri-trail | spectri-specflow
_schema_docs.commands[].origin.upstream_url: URL to upstream source file (required for github-spec-kit/spec-kit-plus, null for spectri)
_schema_docs.commands[].origin.adaptations: Notes on what was changed from upstream (null if no changes)
_schema_docs.commands[].base_template: Filename of base template in src/command-bases/spectri-{family}/ (e.g., 'specify.md')
_schema_docs.commands[].description: Brief description shown in command help and frontmatter
_schema_docs.commands[].injections: Array of injection references applied in order (first = closest to marker)
_schema_docs.commands[].injections[].injection_id: References injections[].id - must exist in injections array
_schema_docs.commands[].injections[].params: Object of key:value params - keys lowercase, replaced as {{UPPERCASE}} in content

_build_notes.marker_format: Base templates use <!-- INJECT: insertion_point --> markers
_build_notes.multi_injection: Multiple injections with same insertion_point stack in array order
_build_notes.param_replacement: Params replace {{UPPERCASE}} placeholders in injection content.md
_build_notes.frontmatter_generation: Build script generates YAML frontmatter from command metadata

injections.name: User Input Block
injections.description: Universal user input block displayed at top of command

injections.name: Frontmatter Update Reminder
injections.description: Post-header frontmatter update instructions for documents

injections.name: Implementation Summary Checkpoint
injections.description: Post-execution reminder to create implementation summary

commands.name: Create Feature Specification

origin.adaptations: Renamed speckit→spectri, added branchless mode support, added checkpoint automation

commands.description: Create or update the feature specification from a natural language feature description.

commands.name: Create Implementation Plan

origin.adaptations: Renamed speckit→spectri, added branchless mode support, added checkpoint automation

commands.description: Execute the implementation planning workflow using the plan template to generate design artifacts.

commands.name: Generate Task List

origin.adaptations: Renamed speckit→spectri, added checkpoint automation, simplified summary creation

commands.description: Generate an actionable, dependency-ordered tasks.md for the feature based on available design artifacts.

commands.name: Execute Implementation Plan

origin.adaptations: Renamed speckit→spectri, merged implement-phase functionality, simplified checkpoint

commands.description: Execute the implementation plan by processing and executing all tasks defined in tasks.md

commands.name: Revise Specification
commands.description: Iteratively refine user stories, FRs, or acceptance criteria in an existing spec.md with automatic frontmatter updates and implementation summary creation.

commands.name: Revise Implementation Plan
commands.description: Iteratively refine the implementation approach in an existing plan.md to reflect changes in spec.md with automatic frontmatter updates, soft validation, and implementation summary creation.

commands.name: Extend Task List
commands.description: Extend an existing tasks.md by adding tasks to align with changes in plan.md (preserving existing tasks) with automatic frontmatter updates, soft validation, and implementation summary creation.

commands.name: Cross-Artifact Alignment Check

origin.adaptations: Renamed speckit→spectri, simplified checkpoint from 35 lines to 2 lines

commands.description: Perform a non-destructive cross-artifact consistency and quality analysis across spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md after task generation.

commands.name: Project Health Check
commands.description: Detect structural drift in Spectri projects by verifying command sync, spec integrity, conventions, and cross-references.

commands.name: Validate Spec Content
commands.description: Validate specs for format, required sections, and consistency. Use pre-commit, in CI pipelines, or after changes to catch errors early.

commands.name: Clarify Specification

origin.adaptations: Renamed speckit→spectri, simplified checkpoint from 35 lines to 2 lines

commands.description: Identify underspecified areas in the current feature spec by asking up to 5 highly targeted clarification questions and encoding answers back into the spec.

commands.name: Generate Requirements Quality Checklist

origin.adaptations: Renamed speckit→spectri, simplified checkpoint from 35 lines to 2 lines

commands.description: Generate a custom checklist for the current feature based on user requirements.

commands.name: Create GitHub Issue
commands.description: Create GitHub issue from rapid capture (verbal/screenshot) or structured input

commands.name: Convert Tasks to GitHub Issues
commands.description: Convert existing tasks into actionable, dependency-ordered GitHub issues for the feature based on available design artifacts.

commands.name: Create Architecture Decision Record
commands.description: Create Architecture Decision Record (ADR) to document significant architectural decisions

commands.name: Create Spec-Level AGENTS.md
commands.description: Create or update spec-level AGENTS.md to track incomplete work state for multi-agent handoffs

commands.name: Create Implementation Summary
commands.description: Create implementation summary for recent work when automatic creation was missed

commands.name: Create or Update Project Constitution

origin.adaptations: Renamed speckit→spectri, simplified checkpoint from 35 lines to 2 lines

commands.description: Create or update the project constitution from interactive or provided principle inputs, ensuring all dependent templates stay in sync.

commands.name: Update Spec Metadata
commands.description: Update spec meta.json fields interactively or via arguments, wrapping update-spec-meta.sh for user-friendly metadata management.

commands.name: Create New Command
commands.description: Create a new Spectri command following Spec Kit format standards and pedagogical design principles.

commands.name: Create Retrospective Specification

origin.adaptations: Renamed speckit→spectri, renamed document→retro, added discovery framework

commands.description: Create a retrospective spec for an already-implemented feature. Documents what EXISTS, not what SHOULD exist.

commands.name: Create or Update Request for Comments (RFC)
commands.description: Create or update Request for Comments (RFC) to document pre-decision architectural proposals

commands.name: Update SPECTRI.md
commands.description: Validate and deploy SPECTRI.md sections from single source file
